raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged for furniture purchases I did not make from Macy's.com. First in XXXX of XXXX. I reported the fraud and was issued a new card. Then there was a charge on the new card for {$2700.00} twice on XX/XX/XXXX. I reported this fraud and only XXXX of the {$2700.00} was credited. I called Macy 's today XXXX XXXX. I was informed that only XXXX of the {$2700.00} charges was credited and that fraud investigation was closed. I informed the call center my balance should be {$0.00} as I have made no purchases. I was informed there is a new charge on XXXX XXXX for {$3600.00} made online. I then opened a new fraud investigation and canceled the credit card since this is the third fraudulent charge made since XX/XX/XXXX. I have no confidence in Macy 's fraud investigation division. 
Tank you, XXXX XXXX
